httpBackend.name: Growth OS Backend API
httpBackend.description: HTTP Basic Auth for Growth OS backend (if required)

httpHeaders.name: Growth OS API Headers
httpHeaders.description: Bearer token auth for Growth OS backend API

setup_instructions: 1. Create a Telegram bot via @BotFather and copy the token
2. Get your Chat ID by messaging @userinfobot or via the Telegram API
3. Replace all YOUR_*_HERE placeholders with actual values
4. In n8n, go to Settings > Credentials and add each credential
5. Update workflow nodes to reference the created credentials

environment_variables.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: Your personal chat ID for notifications
